name: accent_dot_multi_clause

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.21 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] #331 multi-clause selector grammar. A `。`-joined body composes several dots onto the *same* reclaimed run: `mは上ドット付き` dots the m (First) above and `２つめのsは下ドット付き` dots the 2nd s (case-insensitive count) below → Saṁṣa. All clauses' ops resolve against one run and apply together (resolve-all-then-substitute), so the whole directive is a single emphasis node.

source: Samsa［＃mは上ドット付き。２つめのsは下ドット付き］

expected.serialize: Samsa［＃mは上ドット付き。２つめのsは下ドット付き］
